headline: Stocks Resume Decline as Chipmakers and AI Companies Fall

headline: Amazon’s Trucking Push Sparks New Slide in Transport Stocks
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Shares of several large trucking companies plunged on Wednesday after Amazon.com Inc. announced an expansion of its shipping service that has already shaken the transportation and logistics sector and unsettled investors.Most Read from BloombergHouse Republican Says Hegseth’s D-Day Remarks ‘Inappropriate’US Launches Strikes Against Iran After Helicopter Shot DownUS Strikes Iran After Helicopter Downed, Testing Peace TalksStocks Pare Tech-Led Drop as Rotation Gains Speed: Markets W

headline: Amazon Supply Chain Services Announces U.S. Expansion Of Less-Than-Truckload Freight To Any Type Of Destination, Including Third-Party Warehouses, Distribution Centers And Retail Partners
summary: Businesses now have the flexibility to ship by pallet, choosing LTL to share trailer space for partial loads instead of reserving and paying for a full truckload. Since 2019, Amazon LTL has served tens of thousands ofBusinesses now have the flexibility to ship by pallet, choosing LTL to share trailer space for partial loads instead of reserving and paying for a full truckload.

headline: UBS Boosts C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Price Target on Favorable Freight Trends
summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHRW) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy According to D. E. Shaw. On June 1, UBS raised its price recommendation on C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHRW) to $230 from $224. It reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. In a research note, the analyst said the higher […]
